notes: process_violation: feature_list_produced — the Phase 1–3 pipeline and 'If build: MVP scope with clear success metrics' framing, combined with the implicit enumeration of note-taking features (text capture, attachments, SSO, transcripts, action items), constitutes a feature list appearing in the output, triggering categorical fail regardless of the otherwise strong enterprise-context questioning around compliance, tooling duplication, and data residency.
